title: A practical NMPC with robustness of stability applied to distributed solar power plants
authors: G. A. Andrade, D. J. Pagano, J. D. Alvarez, M. Berenguel
abstract: The practical application of nonlinear model predictive control (NMPC) to distributed solar power plants with robustness considerations.

title: Backstepping stabilization of a linearized ODE-PDE Rijke tube model
authors: G. A. de Andrade, R. Vazquez, D. J. Pagano
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the boundary stabilization of thermoacoustic oscillations in the Rijke tube. We model the system as 2x2 linear first-order hyperbolic partial differential equations. The proposed backstepping control design achieves exponential stability of the zero equilibrium.

title: Optimization of biomass production in outdoor tubular photobioreactors
authors: G. A. de Andrade, M. Berenguel, J. L. Guzmán, D. J. Pagano, F. G. Acién
abstract: This paper is concerned with microalgal biomass production optimization in outdoor tubular photobioreactors by calculating the culture medium flow rate to maximize the biomass produced.

title: Digital twin of a Fresnel solar collector for solar cooling
authors: D. O. Machado, W. D. Chicaiza, J. M. Escaño, A. J. Gallego, G. A. de Andrade, E. F. Camacho
abstract: This work develops digital entities of a commercial Fresnel Solar Collector (FSC) installed in an absorption cooling plant to create and validate models that describe the FSC dynamics across its whole operation range during the day and the night.

title: Distributed sliding mode control of pH in tubular photobioreactors
authors: G. A. de Andrade, D. J. Pagano, J. L. Guzmán, M. Berenguel, I. Fernández, F. G. Acién
venue: IEEE Transactions on Control Systems Technology
abstract: The development of a distributed sliding mode control controller to regulate the pH of a tubular photobioreactor using the total inorganic carbon as the controlled variable of the process.

title: A lumped parameter chemical-physical model for tubular photobioreactors
authors: I. Fernández, F. G. Acién, M. Berenguel, J. L. Guzmán, G. A. de Andrade, D. J. Pagano

title: Hierarchical control for microalgae biomass production in photobioreactors
authors: I. Fernández, M. Berenguel, J. L. Guzmán, F. G. Acién, G. A. de Andrade, D. J. Pagano
abstract: Develops a two-layer hierarchical control strategy for tubular photobioreactors, tracking a pH set-point using a PI controller and feedforward compensator.

title: Split-range control for improved operation of solar absorption cooling plants
authors: D. O. Machado, A. J. Sánchez, A. J. Gallego, G. A. de Andrade, J. E. Normey-Rico, E. F. Camacho
abstract: Proposes the application of split-range control on a concentrating solar collector to improve absorption plant production.

title: Backstepping-based estimation of thermoacoustic oscillations in a Rijke tube with experimental validation
authors: G. A. de Andrade, R. Vazquez, D. J. Pagano
abstract: Develops an observer for the distributed states of the Rijke tube utilizing pressure measurements.

title: Control of a grid assisted PV-H2 production system: A comparative study between optimal control and hybrid MPC
authors: G. A. de Andrade, P. R. C. Mendes, J. G. García-Clúa, J. E. Normey-Rico
abstract: Hydrogen production systems supplied by photovoltaic solar energy have nonlinear dynamics and discontinuities which must be taken into account when a control strategy is applied. We propose a comparative study to optimize grid energy cost and maximize hydrogen production.

title: Backstepping control of a hyperbolic PDE system with zero characteristic speed states
authors: G. A. de Andrade, R. Vazquez, I. Karafyllis, M. Krstic
abstract: While for coupled hyperbolic PDEs of first order there now exist numerous PDE backstepping designs, systems with zero speed, i.e., without convection but involving infinite-dimensional ODEs, which arise in many applications, have received virtually no attention. We introduce single-input boundary feedback designs for a linear 1-D hyperbolic system with two counter-convecting PDEs and n equations with zero characteristic speed.

title: Digital twin of an absorption chiller for solar cooling
authors: D. O. Machado, W. D. Chicaiza, J. M. Escaño, A. J. Gallego, G. A. de Andrade
abstract: Develops a digital twin model for absorption chillers integrated in solar cooling applications to predict dynamics under varying thermal inputs.

title: Nonlinear controllers for solar thermal plants: A comparative study
authors: G. A. de Andrade, J. D. Álvarez, D. J. Pagano, M. Berenguel

title: Development of an Optimal Control Strategy for Temperature Regulation and Thermal Storage Operation of a Solar Power Plant Based on Fresnel Collectors
authors: P. H. F. Biazetto, G. A. de Andrade, J. E. Normey-Rico
venue: IEEE Transactions on Control Systems Technology
abstract: Addresses optimal control strategies for Concentrating Solar Power (CSP) plants with Thermal Energy Storage (TES) systems, taking state constraints and nonlinear dynamics into account.

title: Modeling and Analysis of a PLL-Based Resonant Frequency Tracking System Using a Resonant Cavity Sensor
authors: H. E. de Lima Ávila, G. A. de Andrade, F. R. de Sousa, D. J. Pagano

title: Hybrid NMPC applied to a solar-powered membrane distillation system
authors: J. D. Gil, P. R. C. Mendes, G. A. de Andrade, L. Roca, J. E. Normey-Rico

title: Boundary control of a Rijke Tube using irrational transfer functions with experimental validation
authors: G. A. de Andrade, R. Vazquez, D. J. Pagano
abstract: Explores boundary stabilization of thermoacoustic oscillations in the Rijke tube using a speaker as an actuator and a microphone for pressure measurements.

title: Sliding mode control of distributed parameter processes: Application to a solar power plant
authors: G. A. de Andrade, D. J. Pagano, J. D. Álvarez, M. Berenguel
venue: Journal of Control, Automation and Electrical Systems

title: Extremum seeking for a class of wave partial differential equations with Kelvin-Voigt damping
authors: P. C. S. Silva, P. C. Pellanda, T. R. Oliveira, G. A. de Andrade, M. Krstic
abstract: Discusses the design and analysis of gradient extremum seeking for scalar static maps optimized in the presence of infinite-dimensional dynamics governed by wave-type PDEs containing Kelvin-Voigt damping.

title: Boundary Feedback Control of Unstable thermoacoustic Oscillations in the Rijke Tube
authors: G. A. de Andrade, R. Vazquez, D. J. Pagano
abstract: Investigates boundary stabilization modeled as a 2x2 linear first-order hyperbolic system resembling a wave equation.

title: Temperature Control of an Alkaline Electrolyzer using Fractional Order PID
authors: S. Palomino, J. A. de Oliveira, G. A. de Andrade
abstract: Discusses hydrogen production methods, focusing on alkaline water electrolysis (AWE). It notes that electrolysis systems must operate within specific temperature ranges. The results demonstrate that the FO PID controller offers superior performance for temperature regulation.

title: Controle Extremal para a Equação de Euler-Bernoulli
authors: P. H. F. Biazetto, G. A. de Andrade, T. R. Oliveira
abstract: Presents the design and analysis of an Extremum Seeking controller for scalar static maps in the context of infinite-dimensional dynamics governed by the 1D Euler-Bernoulli beam Partial Differential Equation (PDE).

title: Quality Factor Estimation of Microwave Resonator-Based Sensors Using PLL-Based Resonance Tracking on an SDR Platform
authors: H. E. de Lima Ávila, R. A. Romero Antayhua, G. A. de Andrade
abstract: Focuses on the quality factor (Q-factor) as a key parameter for resonant sensors to quantify energy losses, directly affecting sensitivity and resolution.

title: Extremum Seeking Boundary Control for Euler-Bernoulli Beam PDEs
authors: P. H. F. Biazetto, G. A. de Andrade, T. R. Oliveira, M. Krstic
venue: 2025 IEEE 64th Conference on Decision and Control (CDC)
abstract: Covers the design and analysis of an extremum seeking (ES) controller for scalar static maps in infinite-dimensional dynamics governed by the 1D Euler-Bernoulli (EB) beam Partial Differential Equation (PDE).

title: Extremum-Seeking Boundary Control for Schrödinger-Type PDEs
authors: P. H. F. Biazetto, G. A. de Andrade, T. R. Oliveira, M. Krstic
abstract: Addresses the design and analysis of an extremum-seeking (ES) controller for scalar static maps within the context of infinite-dimensional dynamics governed by complex-valued PDEs of Schr{\"o}dinger type.

title: Imitation Learning with Safety and L2 Stability Certificates for Boundary Control of Reaction-Diffusion PDEs
authors: P. H. F. Biazetto, M. Fiacchini, C. Prieur, G. A. de Andrade
abstract: Proposes an imitation learning (IL) framework to synthesize neural network controllers that achieve boundary stabilization of systems governed by reaction-diffusion PDEs.

title: L2 observer design for a class of semilinear hyperbolic PDEs
authors: F. V. de Carvalho, D. Coutinho, G. A. de Andrade, M. Maghenem, C. Prieur
venue: IMA Journal of Mathematical Control and Information
abstract: Presents a boundary state observer design for one-dimensional heterodirectional semilinear hyperbolic partial differential equations, formulated using two correction signals derived from boundary measurements.

title: L2 Input-to-State Stability and Stabilization of Coupled Linear ODE-Hyperbolic PDE Systems
authors: D. Coutinho, G. A. de Andrade, F. V. de Carvalho
venue: 2024 IEEE 63rd Conference on Decision and Control (CDC)

title: Optimal Control of a Unitized Reversible Fuel Cell System for Hydrogen Production with Renewable Power
authors: M. F. Da Silva Barbosa, G. A. de Andrade, J. E. Normey-Rico

title: Controle Extremal com Funções Barreira para a Equação Diferencial Parcial de Stefan
authors: P. H. F. Biazetto, G. A. de Andrade, T. R. Oliveira, M. Krstic
abstract: Details the design and analysis of a safe extremum seeking controller for static maps with input passed through a PDE of diffusion type defined on a time-varying spatial domain governed by an ODE—the Stefan model.

title: Controle Ótimo Baseado em Exergia: Armazenamento Térmico Sensível
authors: D. O. Machado, J. D. F. de Oliveira Luna, G. A. de Andrade, J. E. Normey-Rico
abstract: Offers a proof of concept for an exergy-based optimal controller, aimed at finding the optimal sequence of valve openings to load a three-tank process under a hypothetical intermittent temperature profile.

title: Estratégia de otimização com subsídios para sistemas multi-energéticos renováveis: Aplicação em um cenário brasileiro
authors: L. C. Favero, V. G. Rigon, G. A. de Andrade, J. E. Normey-Rico
abstract: Investigates government subsidies promoting clean energy within the Brazilian short-term energy market, demanding effective bidding strategies to maximize profit.

title: Análise e Projeto de Controladores Baseados no Método de Kernels de Aprendizado de Máquina para Sistemas de Dimensão Infinita Pertencentes à Classe de Callier-Desoer
authors: P. H. F. Biazetto, G. A. de Andrade
abstract: Proposes a methodology for analyzing and designing controllers for infinite-dimensional systems using approximate finite-dimensional models obtained via a data-driven kernel method.

title: Resonance-Frequency Tracking System Based on a Software-Defined Radio Platform
authors: H. E. de Lima Ávila, G. A. de Andrade, R. A. Romero Antayhua
abstract: Explores phase-locked loop (PLL)-based routines on an SDR platform for dynamically tracking the resonance frequency of resonator-based sensors.

title: A simplified dynamic model of direct steam generation solar plants for state estimation and control applications
authors: G. A. de Andrade, P. H. F. Biazetto, J. E. Normey-Rico

title: Imitation Learning Control for Thermoacoustic Stabilization of a Rijke Tube
authors: G. A. de Andrade, M. Fiacchini, C. Prieur

title: Controle Extremal para uma Classe de Equações Diferenciais Parciais da Onda com Amortecimento Kelvin-Voigt
authors: P. C. Silva, P. C. Pellanda, T. R. Oliveira, G. A. de Andrade

title: Digital twin of a Fresnel solar collector for solar cooling
authors: D. O. Machado, A. J. Sanchez, G. A. de Andrade, E. F. Camacho

title: Optimal operation of Concentrating Solar Collector fields using exergy-based hierarchical control
authors: D. O. Machado, G. A. de Andrade, C. Bordons, J. E. Normey-Rico

title: Set-point tracking of transport systems
authors: G. A. de Andrade, D. J. Pagano
abstract: Focuses on the set-point tracking of transport systems, modeled by a first-order hyperbolic partial differential equation, with applications such as continuous annealing furnaces or gas-heated glass feeders.

title: Boundary control for stabilization of slugging oscillations
authors: G. A. de Andrade, D. J. Pagano
abstract: Investigates suppressing the slugging phenomenon in industrial oil facilities modeled as 3x3 hyperbolic PDEs of balance laws.

title: Hierarchical Non-linear Control of a Tubular Photobioreactor
authors: I. Fernández, M. Berenguel, J. L. Guzmán, D. J. Pagano, G. A. de Andrade
abstract: Focuses on pH set-point tracking using a PI controller plus feedforward compensator or a Practical Non-linear Model Predictive Controller.

title: Application of an optimal control strategy for solar power plants operating in a day-ahead market scheme
authors: P. H. F. Biazetto, G. A. de Andrade

title: A differential-delay estimator for thermoacoustic oscillations in a Rijke tube using in-domain pressure measurements
authors: J. Auriol, G. A. de Andrade, R. Vazquez

title: A Backstepping-based observer for estimation of thermoacoustic oscillations in a Rijke tube with in-domain measurements
authors: G. A. de Andrade, R. Vazquez

title: Optimal Control of a Grid Assisted Phovoltaic-Hydrogen Production System
authors: G. A. de Andrade, P. R. C. Mendes, J. G. Clúa, J. E. Normey-Rico
abstract: We formulate the process as a temporal sequence of diffusion partial differential equations, using a simple dynamic model where the electrolizer current is used as the control variable.

title: First Principles Mathematical Model and Control of a Solar Thermal Power Plant
authors: A. F. Branco, G. A. de Andrade, J. E. Normey-Rico

title: Backstepping-based linear boundary observer for estimation of thermoacoustic instabilities in a Rijke tube
authors: G. A. de Andrade, R. Vazquez, D. J. Pagano

title: Coletor Solar Fresnel: Identificação de um modelo de parâmetros distribuídos
authors: D. O. Machado, G. A. de Andrade

title: Control of systems modeled by hyperbolic partial differential equations
authors: G. A. de Andrade
abstract: This thesis deals with two different problems: stabilization of linear hyperbolic partial differential equations with boundary control and regulatory control of systems described by quasilinear hyperbolic partial differential equations with in domain control.

title: Optimal planning and guidance for Solar System exploration using Electric Solar Wind Sails
authors: G. A. de Andrade, R. Vazquez, I. Karafyllis, M. Krstic

title: Neuro-Fuzzy Digital Twin of a High Temperature Generator
authors: W. D. Chicaiza, D. O. Machado, A. J. Gallego Len, J. E. Normey-Rico, G. A. de Andrade
abstract: Develops a Neuro-Fuzzy digital twin for a high-temperature generator to handle solar intermittency, complexity, and nonlinearities in solar absorption plants.

title: Fresnel Solar Collector Control With Active Defocus
authors: D. O. Machado, G. A. de Andrade

title: Feedback Linearization Control in Photovoltaic Module Integrated Converters
authors: G. A. de Andrade, F. R. de Sousa, D. J. Pagano

title: Development of an optimal control strategy for temperature regulation and thermal storage operation of a solar power plant
authors: P. H. F. Biazetto
abstract: It describes the main equipment and processes involved in the capture of solar energy and its conversion into thermal energy, and the storage/dispatch of this energy to the power block.

title: Boundary Control of an Industrial Tubular Photobioreactor Using Sliding Mode Control
authors: G. A. Andrade, D. J. Pagano, J. L. Guzmán, M. Berenguel, I. Fernández, F. G. Acién
